name: MyceliaDB Enterprise Fun Plugin Activation Hotfix
changes: Built-in enterprise and fun plugin dashboards now only expose plugins whose manifest is installed and enabled.
Reaction Stickers UI is hidden until reaction_stickers plugin is enabled; core like/dislike remain available.
Non-core sticker reactions are rejected server-side unless reaction_stickers plugin is enabled.
Blog Mood Theme selector and badges are hidden until blog_mood_themes plugin is enabled.
blog_theme storage is rejected server-side unless blog_mood_themes plugin is enabled.
Polls and Time Capsules are gated by their enabled plugin manifests.
Regression tests added for inert-by-default plugin behavior.
